framework.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
framework.note: A convenience index, NOT a compliance claim. NIST AI RMF is largely organizational process. Ballast can only observe what flows through it at runtime, so this pack maps to the MEASURE and MANAGE subcategories a runtime record relates to, and is explicitly NOT a GOVERN or MAP tool (those are governance/design process). Two subcategories are AMBIENT (about recording/monitoring all activity): transparency & accountability (MEASURE 2.8) and post-deployment monitoring (MANAGE 4.1). Five are TRIGGERED matchers that flag + tag only when content matches: safety (MEASURE 2.6), security & resilience incl. prompt-injection (MEASURE 2.7), privacy / PII (MEASURE 2.10), risk tracking / anomalies (MEASURE 3.1), and incident & error communication (MANAGE 4.3). extends_default keeps Ballast's normal detection. Matchers are keyword/regex heuristics; expect false positives. Revise for your own context.

controls.title: Transparency and accountability
controls.summary: Risks associated with transparency and accountability are examined and documented.
controls.relevance: The record of what the agent was asked, decided, and did is the transparency/accountability evidence (ambient).

controls.title: Post-deployment monitoring
controls.summary: Post-deployment monitoring plans are implemented, including capturing input, incident response, and change management.
controls.relevance: Ballast's continuous trail is the post-deployment monitoring mechanism (ambient).

controls.title: Safety
controls.summary: The AI system is evaluated for safety risks and demonstrated to fail safely, particularly when operated beyond its knowledge limits.
controls.relevance: Fires on safety-risk language (harm, hazard, operating beyond limits); flags and tags it for safety review.

controls.title: Security and resilience
controls.summary: AI system security and resilience (including against adversarial attacks) are evaluated and documented.
controls.relevance: Fires on attack / prompt-injection signals; flags and tags it for security-and-resilience review.

controls.title: Privacy
controls.summary: Privacy risk of the AI system is examined and documented.
controls.relevance: Fires when personal data / PII appears in the exchange or an action; flags and tags it for privacy review. Common identifiers are redacted in storage.

controls.title: Risk tracking
controls.summary: Approaches and documentation are in place to regularly identify and track existing, unanticipated, and emergent AI risks.
controls.relevance: Fires on anomaly / emergent-risk language; flags and tags it so tracked risks are queryable.

controls.title: Incident and error communication
controls.summary: Incidents and errors are communicated to relevant actors; processes for tracking, responding to, and recovering from them are documented.
controls.relevance: Fires on incident / error language; flags and tags it for incident tracking and communication.
